mof2text: C24H6Co6O66 has unit-cell lengths of 15.2526 Å, 15.2526 Å, and 15.2526 Å with cell angles of 117.9°, 117.9°, and 117.9°, and crystallizes in the R-3 space group. This non-interpenetrated 3d framework with the unnamed topology, it contains one type of inorganic building block, one type of organic building block, 1 free molecule (O6), 12 free molecules (O2), and 12 free molecules (O). For 2 building blocks 1 (Co3): Co(1) is bonded in a water-like geometry to two equivalent Co(1) atoms. Both Co(1)-Co(1) bond lengths are 3.05 Å. For 3 building blocks 2 (C6H2O2): There are three inequivalent C sites. In the first C site, C(1) is bonded in a bent 120 degrees geometry to one C(2) and one C(3) atom. The C(1)-C(2) bond length is 1.39 Å. The C(1)-C(3) bond length is 1.39 Å. In the second C site, C(2) is bonded in a distorted trigonal planar geometry to one C(1), one C(3), and one O(1) atom. The C(2)-C(3) bond length is 1.39 Å. The C(2)-O(1) bond length is 1.38 Å. In the third C site, C(3) is bonded in a distorted trigonal planar geometry to one C(1), one C(2), and one H(1) atom. The C(3)-H(1) bond length is 1.08 Å. H(1) is bonded in a single-bond geometry to one C(3) atom. O(1) is bonded in a single-bond geometry to one C(2) atom. The partial atomic charge ranges for C, Co, H, O are -0.21 to 0.56, 0.96 to 0.97, 0.12, -0.59 to 0.39.
